text.title: token-organization Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the token-organization methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-existing-tokens
step.action: Categorise each token into primitives / semantic / component. Flag misplacements.

step.name: rename-to-convention
step.decision-gate: Reject hyphens or camelCase in source.

step.name: lint-rules
step.action: Add lint rules: reject primitive references in component layer; reject raw hex/px in semantic+; enforce dots; require state suffix.
